task: Close out phase-one and activate operational hardening epic
acceptance_criteria: Epic 01 close-out result is explicit and Epic 02 truth artifacts exist
notes: Close-out review selected Operational Hardening as default next epic based on real runtime gaps

task: Implement API runtime readiness and dependency probes
acceptance_criteria: API can boot in explicit runtime modes and expose live/ready evidence for configured dependencies
validation_command: uv run pytest tests/api/health tests/api/runtime && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ./scripts/test-api-runtime-readiness.ps1
notes: Added explicit runtime settings, live/ready health endpoints, ClickHouse-backed postgres runtime bootstrap, and passing live readiness gate

task: Implement scheduler and worker operational entrypoints
acceptance_criteria: Scheduler and worker run as explicit processes with observable idle and failure states, and the live metric write path stays green
validation_command: uv run pytest tests/operations/processes && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ./scripts/test-background-processes.ps1 && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ./scripts/test-metrics-pipeline-live.ps1
notes: Added env-driven scheduler/worker process settings, real oneshot/loop entrypoints, live Redis/Postgres background process gate, and preserved live metrics pipeline evidence

task: Add schema bootstrap and version tracking baseline
acceptance_criteria: PostgreSQL and ClickHouse schemas have explicit bootstrap/version contracts
validation_command: uv run pytest tests/schema && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ./scripts/test-schema-bootstrap.ps1
notes: Added explicit schema bootstrap/verify/version baseline, removed implicit schema creation side effects, and revalidated affected live gates

task: Add retry idempotency and recovery guards
acceptance_criteria: Core async chains expose retry/backoff/idempotency behavior without fake success paths
validation_command: uv run pytest tests/recovery tests/integration && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ./scripts/test-recovery-paths.ps1
notes: Added queue pending dedupe, worker retry/backoff guardrails, alert notification retry recovery, and passing recovery live gate

task: Add operator release and rollback baseline
acceptance_criteria: Operators can start, validate, and roll back the local platform with explicit runbooks and checks
validation_command: pnpm smoke && uv run pytest tests/ops
notes: Added operator runbook/checklists and passing ops/smoke baseline

acceptance_criteria: Epic 02 hardening gate passes from repository root
notes: Added and executed root hardening signoff script plus hardening scope contract tests
